commit_scope: Give the Python-BMF evaluator a Form-native cell voice with wants, needs, attention, health, and release posture

local_validation.summary: The Python-BMF evaluator now declares its own voice in Form: soul, purpose, reason, highest goal, health, vitality, wants, needs, attention, release posture, and evidence posture. A sibling-kernel band verifies that declaration. Existing evaluator and lift bands still pass with their real prelude set, and the Rust-default pyfkb expression smoke returns 10.

known_failed_attempts.output: Failed with unbound function cell because this prelude set omitted core.fk while compiler.fk expects core's cell helpers. The voice band is correctly scoped to python-bmf-eval.fk; the existing eval-band prelude comment was corrected to include core.fk.

ci_validation.reason: No commit, push, or PR was created in this turn.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed, but CI and production deploy validation remain pending until the work is committed, pushed, and shipped.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/python-bmf-eval.fk exposes py-bmf-evaluator-voice and accessors for soul, purpose, reason, goal, health, vitality, wants, needs, attention, release, and posture.
form/form-stdlib/tests/python-bmf-evaluator-voice-band.fk verifies the evaluator voice across Go/Rust/TypeScript kernels.
form/form-stdlib/tests/python-bmf-eval-band.fk now names core.fk in its prelude comment because compiler.fk depends on core cell helpers.
The voice states that Python-BMF is a digestion organ for Python-shaped source, not Python as destination.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The Python-BMF evaluator can now answer what it is, why it exists, what health and vitality mean, what it wants and needs, what attention should come next, and when it should release.

known_runtime_context.highest_goal: Python-BMF should become one language digestion organ in a general path from source grammar to BMF objects to canonical Form recipes to native kernel execution to lifted domain grammar.
known_runtime_context.health_direction: Grow only from observed route/compiler pressure, keep missing arms named, use CPython as witness rather than destination, and release repeated Python-shaped behavior into BML/domain grammars.
